0.q: Peroxidase plays prominent roles in antioxidant responses and stress tolerance in plants.

1.q: The chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) qPCR revealed that the LcLTP, LcRP, and LcPrx promoter enrichment fold were significantly higher in the LcERF056-OE plants than in the WT or LcERF056-RNAi plants

2.q: ChIP qPCR revealed that the LcLTP, LcRP, and LcPrx promoter enrichment fold were significantly higher in the LcERF056-OE plants than in the WT or LcERF056-RNAi plants.

3.q: LcLTP, LcRP, and LcPrx were significantly downregulated in LcERF056-RNAi plants and highly upregulated in LcERF056-OE plants, consistent with the expression patterns of the LcERF056 gene
